title: Senior Backend Engineer
score_reasoning: Your background in Python and Go distributed systems is strong, but this role's primary stack is Java/Spring—a significant gap not present in your CV. While you have relevant experience with Kafka, Docker, and high-scale systems (40TB/day, hundreds of thousands RPS align with your 4M+ events/day work), the on-site requirement in Tel Aviv creates a hard location blocker that disqualifies the role regardless of technical fit. The hybrid schedule mentions 3 days in-office, which is incompatible with your Berlin base and remote-first preference, placing you >3 hours from the company's timezone and requiring physical presence you cannot commute to.

red_flags: Primary language is Java; your experience is Python/Go
On-site hybrid in Tel Aviv (3 days/week required)
Location far outside acceptable regions (Israel vs. Europe/UK/Switzerland)
Spring/Java ecosystem is not in your core stack
